title: CI Doctor MQ Investigation
description: Canonical structure for a single merge-queue CI failure investigation record written by the CI Failure Doctor (Merge Queue) workflow to /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory/default/mq/investigations/<timestamp>-<run-id>.json. This schema does not apply to the investigations index.json aggregate file.

schema_version.description: Version of this investigation schema. Always "1.0".

investigation_id.description: Filesystem-safe identifier matching the file name without extension: <YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM-SS-sss>-<run-id> (no colons).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC time the investigation was produced (e.g., 2026-05-12T14:30:00Z).

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run ID of the failed merge-queue workflow, encoded as a string.

run_url.description: URL of the failed GitHub Actions workflow run.

workflow_name.description: Name of the failed workflow (e.g., "Linux (Ubuntu 22.04, Python 3.11)"). Never the CI Doctor MQ workflow itself.

pr_number.description: Affected merge-queue PR number as a string, or null when no PR can be identified.

pr_url.description: Affected merge-queue PR URL, or null when no PR can be identified.

author.description: GitHub login of the PR/commit author, or null when unknown.

category.description: Failure category. Must match the category used to compute the pattern signature.

title.description: Short, searchable failure description (no PR or run numbers).

signature.description: Stable failure signature string (normalized error | failed job | category) shared with the pattern record.

signature_hash.description: Hash of the signature; matches the pattern file name <signature-hash>.json.

failed_jobs.description: List of jobs that failed in the run.

name.description: Exact job name from the workflow run.

key_errors.description: Most relevant raw log excerpts (trimmed) that evidence the failure.

root_cause.description: Explanation of why the failure occurred (the actual root cause, not a restatement of the symptom).

reproduction_steps.description: Concrete steps to reproduce locally, or "N/A" if not reproducible outside CI.

recommended_actions.description: Specific, actionable steps to fix the issue.

prevention_strategies.description: How to prevent similar failures in the future.

historical_context.description: Similar past failures and their resolutions.
